title: Zion Rising

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: On holy mountains, ancient stones
Where heaven meets the earth below
The gates of Zion stand in gold
More precious than all lands we know

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Glory rises from your walls
Nations hear the sacred call
From every tongue and tribe they come
To find their home in Zion's halls
(Where all belong, in Zion's halls)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Egypt, Babylon, far Tyre
Their children dance in Zion's square
Ethiopia and distant shores
All find their sacred birthright there

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Glory rises from your walls
Nations hear the sacred call
From every tongue and tribe they come
To find their home in Zion's halls
(Where all belong, in Zion's halls)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Springs of life flow deep within
Where dancers sing and joy begins
Every soul that seeks finds peace
In ancient streets where hope still rings
The Most High writes in heaven's scroll
Each name among the chosen throng
And as they dance through Zion's gates
Their hearts burst forth in freedom's song

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Glory rises from your walls
Nations hear the sacred call
From every tongue and tribe they come
To find their home in Zion's halls
(Where all belong, in Zion's halls)

epigraph: The LORD loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob
